---
title: "gravity_db.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/intel/gravity_db.ts"
loc: 83
complexity: 11
logic_score: 2.17
style_score: 3.64
intel_score: 9.71
overall_score: 5.40
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 15 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://better-sqlite3)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [registry](file://../pathRegistry.ts)
- [GitChronograph](file://./git_monitor.ts)

### Exports
- `db`
- `getGravityDb`
- `getGravityDb`
- `statsDir`
- `dbPath`
- `getFileGravity`
- `getFileGravity`
- `database`
- `normalized`
- `W1`
- `W2`
- `W3`
- `row`
- `now`
- `commits30d`
- `lines7d`
- `pings48h`
- `churn`
- `pennyDbPath`
- `pennyDb`
- `fortyEightHoursAgo`
- `pingRow`
- `manualWeight`
- `G`
- `updateFileGravity`
- `updateFileGravity`
- `database`
- `normalized`
- `setFileGravity`
- `setFileGravity`
- `database`
- `normalized`
